news.title:
8 of India's top 10 firms added ₹4.13 lakh crore market cap; HDFC, ICICI led gains.
Reliance stayed top-valued; Infosys, Reliance saw mcap erosion amid Sensex, Nifty surge.
news.summary:
8 of India's top 10 firms added ₹4.13 lakh crore market cap; HDFC, ICICI led gains.
Reliance stayed top-valued; Infosys, Reliance saw mcap erosion amid Sensex, Nifty surge.

news.title:
IT stocks like TCS, Infosys, HCL Tech drop as Nifty IT crashes 2% on April 10, driven by Anthropic's new AI model Mythos.
TCS reports Q4FY26 profit rise of 12.2% YoY to ₹13,718 crore, despite annual revenue decline of 0.5% to $30.08 billion.
news.summary:
IT stocks like TCS, Infosys, HCL Tech drop as Nifty IT crashes 2% on April 10, driven by Anthropic's new AI model Mythos.
TCS reports Q4FY26 profit rise of 12.2% YoY to ₹13,718 crore, despite annual revenue decline of 0.5% to $30.08 billion.

news.title:
ADRs for Indian stocks are losing relevance as domestic markets deepen, easing global access and liquidity.
HDFC Bank and Infosys ADRs highlight declining premiums, reflecting reduced foreign investor reliance on ADRs.
news.summary:
ADRs for Indian stocks are losing relevance as domestic markets deepen, easing global access and liquidity.
HDFC Bank and Infosys ADRs highlight declining premiums, reflecting reduced foreign investor reliance on ADRs.

news.title:
Nifty IT index gained 9% in April; midcap IT outperformed largecap peers.
TCS results met expectations; Wipro announced a buyback, Infosys ADRs fell 1.5%.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index gained 9% in April; midcap IT outperformed largecap peers.
TCS results met expectations; Wipro announced a buyback, Infosys ADRs fell 1.5%.

news.title:
Infosys ADR fell 2.6% and Wipro ADR declined 1% after TCS reported a 2.4% CC revenue degrowth in FY26.
TCS's Q4 net profit rose 29% to Rs 13,720 crore, driven by AI focus with partnerships like Anthropic and Nvidia.
news.summary:
Infosys ADR fell 2.6% and Wipro ADR declined 1% after TCS reported a 2.4% CC revenue degrowth in FY26.
TCS's Q4 net profit rose 29% to Rs 13,720 crore, driven by AI focus with partnerships like Anthropic and Nvidia.

news.title:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.
news.summary:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.

news.title:
Indian IT stocks, including Infosys and HCLTech, fell 1-2% due to profit booking and softer demand signals.
Morgan Stanley cites deceleration in BFSI and Retail IT spending; AI-led disruption adds pressure on valuation multiples.
news.summary:
Indian IT stocks, including Infosys and HCLTech, fell 1-2% due to profit booking and softer demand signals.

news.title:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.
news.summary:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.

news.title:
Nifty drops below 23,850 as Infosys, Interglobe, M&M, and L&T lead losses.
Market decline follows US President's statement on weapons near Iran.

news.title:
Infosys, HCLTech, and Hinduja Global Services filed WARN notices in the US.
These notices were filed in Texas, Florida, and Pennsylvania in early 2026.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang reinitiates coverage on Infosys with a 'Buy' and Rs 1,746 target, citing strong fundamentals and cash reserves.
Infosys sees 40% YoY net new TCV growth in 9M FY26, ensuring revenue visibility; trading 30% below 10-year mean valuations.
news.summary:

news.title:
Asian markets surged up to 5% after a 15-day ceasefire between Iran and the US; Gift Nifty jumped 700 points.
Infosys, GAIL, and Aurobindo Pharma among stocks in focus; oil prices plunged ~14% amid eased geopolitical risks.
news.summary:

news.title:
Infosys partners with Harness for AI-led software delivery; GAIL signs LNG carrier deal with Alpha Gas.
SRF faces ₹327.4 cr tax demand; Muthoot Finance sets FY26 interim dividend record date as Apr 13, 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:
Infosys and Harness announce a strategic collaboration to accelerate AI-driven enterprise transformation and modernization.
The partnership combines Infosys Topaz, Cobalt, and Harness AI to enhance productivity, governance, and scalability in software delivery.

news.title:

Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.
